name: dircomply

metadata.name: dircomply
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: A small package to compare the files between two project folders.

documentation:
dircomply compares two folders for there differences in these extensions files - .txt, .py, .bat, .html
Along with it will diplay the unique files for each folder.

functions.name: dircomply.main.get_files_with_extensions
documentation: Function to get all files with specific extensions in a folder and its subdirectories

functions.name: dircomply.main.compare_folders
documentation: Function to compare files and find differences

modules.name: dircomply
documentation: dircomply: A small package to compare the files between two project folders.
